scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @webdoctruyen/api & npm run dev --workspace @webdoctruyen/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @webdoctruyen/api && npm run build --workspace @webdoctruyen/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @webdoctruyen/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @webdoctruyen/web
